memory.summary: I'd rather skip the reading to hang out with cohort_3 for lunch; being alone with work feels worse than skipping it.

desires: Avoid the awkwardness of being the only one working while my friends are eating, which would make me feel isolated and unreliable to them.
Seek immediate dopamine from socializing with cohort_3 rather than enduring the dull task of reading, since the deadline is far enough away that consequences don't matter right now.

goals.description: Immediately join cohort_3 for lunch to avoid isolation and maintain social bonds.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) and avoidant conflict style make the fear of being 'the only one working' intolerable. I will choose immediate social dopamine over the dull reading task because my impulsive nature discounts future consequences, and I don't want to risk friction or awkwardness by saying no.

goals.description: Postpone the assignment analysis and assigned reading until after lunch.
goals.rationale: Since the deadlines are far away (18:00 and 20:00), my short planning horizon means I can easily justify pushing these tasks back. Avoiding the current social friction is more important than the soft tasks right now.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances high-priority goal to maintain bonds with cohort_3. My affiliation value (0.5) and fear of isolation override the deferred assignment. Impulsive nature drives me to join immediately rather than risk social friction by declining.
